use_cases: Global site search in SaaS applications with animated expansion
Header navigation search bar that saves space when collapsed
Mobile-first search that expands on tap for better UX
Command palette style search for dev-tools interfaces
E-commerce product search with smooth open/close animations
ai_summary: An expandable search bar component with smooth Framer Motion animations that supports left or right expansion directions. Features auto-focus on expansion, click-outside-to-close behavior when empty, and customizable width and placeholder. Designed for saving UI space while maintaining full search functionality, ideal for headers, navigation bars, or any interface needing inline search.
